title: Rich output (highlighted code + copy) + visible working/streaming feedback (shared claude-chat, additive)

tests.summary: 9 passed; asserts working indicator + elapsed + hint, .cc-codeblock highlighted (.hljs-keyword) + lang label 'typescript' for an annotated fence, code Copy + per-message Copy via clipboard, raw HTML escaped (no , no onerror)

build.summary: both shared-component consumers build (dev-env non-regression confirmed)

codexReview.notes: R1: clipboard-guard + global-marked-singleton (both fixed); R2: raw-HTML XSS (fixed via html() escape override + e2e assertion); R3: approve. Same-model review also fixed: fence info-string lang key, undeclared highlight.js dep.

designAudit.notes: working indicator (bouncing sage dots + WORKING + elapsed + hint), dark ink code card with lang label + copy, per-message copy, streaming cursor — all consistent with Garrison language.
